Pure Renewal / Concierge Medicine

CONCIERGE
MEDICINE.

Comprehensive · Physician-Led · Personalized

With concierge medicine, you gain direct access to your physician, a wellness plan designed for your unique needs, and a team invested in every step of your journey. This is more than healthcare — it's a commitment to vitality, resilience, and living life fully.

With Concierge Medicine

What You
Gain.

01
Personalized Care
Direct access to your physician and a wellness plan designed for your unique needs — not a generic protocol. Your biology, your goals, your plan.
02
Proactive Health Management
Advanced testing and therapies that prevent disease, rather than just treating it. We stay ahead of imbalance through continuous biomarker monitoring.
03
Whole-Body Optimization
From cellular repair to immune enhancement, every protocol is crafted to elevate long-term wellness — mind, body, and biological age.
04
A True Partnership
Time, attention, and expertise dedicated to guiding you toward your best health — with a physician invested in every step of your journey.
05
Physician Managed Weight Loss
Utilizing the latest and most effective weight loss therapies for lasting results — including GLP-1, GLP-2, and GLP-3 with microdosing peptide therapy.

Our multidisciplinary team of board-certified specialists deliver truly comprehensive care in a State of Florida–approved, Level 3 surgical and clinical environment.

We combine cutting-edge medical innovation with personalized, concierge-level care to create transformative outcomes for every patient. No waiting rooms, no rushed appointments, no one-size-fits-all protocols.

At Pure Renewal, your physician knows your name, your history, your goals, and your biology. Every interaction is an opportunity to refine your protocol, answer your questions, and push your health further than conventional medicine thought possible.

This is more than healthcare — it's a commitment to vitality, resilience, and living life fully, with a physician who is invested in every step of your journey.

Board-Certified Specialties
Neurosurgery Orthopedic Surgery Pain Management Regenerative Medicine Integrative Oncology Internal Medicine Preventive Medicine

"This is more than healthcare — it's a commitment to vitality, resilience, and living life fully, with a physician who is invested in every step of your journey."

Pure Renewal · Concierge Philosophy
Primary Care

B. Well
Primary Care.

Our concierge primary care model removes the barriers of traditional medicine. No wait times, no rushed visits, no assembly-line care. Direct access to your physician — when you need it, how you need it.

Included in All B.Well Plans
◆ Physician-led weight loss — GLP-1, 2 and 3
◆ Tailored vitamin therapy for your unique needs
◆ IV Vita Infusions — restore lost nutrients
◆ High-Dose Vitamin C infusions
◆ Nutritional supplements — physician-curated
◆ Ozone therapy protocols
◆ Red light therapy sessions
◆ Specialty peptide therapy blends
Real Results. Real Patients.

Physician weight loss with microdosing peptide therapy that targets fat loss and protects muscle mass. Our FIT/SLIM Protocol combines the latest GLP-1/2/3 science with precision peptide microdosing — backed by real patient outcomes and continuous physician oversight.

GLP-1
Semaglutide
GLP-2
Teduglutide
GLP-3
Retatrutide
Concierge Services

Everything
Included.

All concierge plans include access to our full suite of restorative services — physician-led and tailored to your biology.

Physician-Led Weight Loss
GLP-1, 2 and 3 protocols with microdosing peptide therapy. Real results, real patients — targeting fat loss while preserving lean muscle mass.
Tailored Vitamin Therapy
Physician-formulated vitamin protocols customized to your specific deficiencies, lifestyle, and health objectives.
IV Vita Infusions
Intravenous delivery of essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients directly into the bloodstream for maximum absorption and effect.
Hi-Dose Vitamin C
High-dose IV Vitamin C for immune fortification, oxidative therapy, and supportive oncology care.
Nutritional Supplements
Physician-curated supplement protocols designed to complement your regenerative therapy plan and support ongoing vitality.
Ozone Therapy
Targeted ozone protocols enhancing oxygen efficiency, activating immune function, and elevating cellular vitality.
Red Light Therapy
Photobiomodulation for tissue repair, inflammation reduction, skin health, and accelerated healing. Heal faster, feel better, age gracefully.
Specialty Peptide Blends
14 physician-formulated peptide blends targeting every aspect of health — from longevity and immune support to cognitive enhancement and athletic recovery.
Ongoing Physician Support
Direct access to your physician for questions, protocol adjustments, and continuous monitoring — no waitlists, no delays.
Specialty Peptide Blends

Tailored
to
You.

Our specialty peptide blends are physician-formulated combinations designed to address your specific health goals — from athletic recovery to hormonal balance, cognitive enhancement to longevity.

Each blend is precisely dosed, evidence-based, and continuously monitored by your physician. This is peptide therapy as it was meant to be practiced: personalized, powerful, and physician-led.

14 precision peptide protocols — one for every dimension of your health and performance.

Immune resilience support

Request a Consultation

Start Your
Journey.

Every new patient begins with a complimentary physician consultation — no pressure, no commitments. Just a real conversation about your health, your goals, and what concierge medicine can do for you.

Complimentary consultation — full physician evaluation at no cost.
No wait times — direct physician access from day one.
Plans from $249/month — individual, family & small business plans available.
0% patient financing — flexible payment plans with no interest.
Tele-health available — connect from anywhere via video or phone.
Request Consult

Our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule your complimentary physician consultation.

All information is handled in strict confidence. · (407) 333-0496 · info@pure-renewal.com
